result.stdout:
CoverageChecker.CommandLine 0.9.0+a61d48c41247a8c462200b72a38939ad5ebc297d
Copyright (c) 2026 Thomas Shephard

  -f, --format              (Default: Auto) Format of coverage files. Default:
                            Auto Valid values: Auto, Cobertura, SonarQube

  -d, --directory           Directory where coverage files are located. Default:
                            Current directory

  -g, --glob-patterns       (Default: **/*.xml) Glob patterns of coverage file
                            locations. Default: **/*.xml

  -i, --include             Glob patterns of files to include in the coverage
                            analysis.

  -e, --exclude             Glob patterns of files to exclude from the coverage
                            analysis.

  -l, --line-threshold      Line coverage threshold (percentage). Default: 80

  -b, --branch-threshold    Branch coverage threshold (percentage). Default: 80

  --delta                   Calculate coverage for changed lines only.

  --delta-base              (Default: origin/main) Base branch or commit to
                            compare against for delta coverage. Default:
                            origin/main

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
